name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that skips generic templates for polished, on-brand slides.
problem: Creating professional presentations is time-consuming, and most AI tools produce generic, visually bland results that require heavy manual cleanup. Chronicle 2.0 aims to automate slide creation while preserving design quality and brand consistency, reducing the gap between AI speed and human-level output.
useCases: Build investor pitch decks with consistent branding and clean layouts
Generate client-facing reports and business updates without manual design work
Create internal team presentations quickly from existing content or outlines
Produce marketing and product showcase decks that don't look AI-generated
